reply:
[[BLOCK:slide68_shape1]]
SAS’s Generalized Regression (Generalized Regression) accepts all types of data (categorical and continuous). Thus, Generalized Regression can replace OLS Regression and logistic regression models.  
It can address the issue of Multi-collinearity (Multi-collinearity).  
It can prevent overfitting.  
Instead of relying on a single approach like traditional regression modeling, Generalized Regression explores multiple solutions, ultimately providing the optimal outcome among all possible options.
